description: Class diagram edges not detected by structural analysis. Parsing works, edges ARE rendered (4 relation groups in SVG), but structural analysis reports 0 edges. May be a detection issue in the eval.
notes: UPDATE: Parsing now works. Class diagram no longer has parse failure. Issue is now in structural analysis - edge detection reports 0 edges but 4 edges ARE rendered in SVG (verified by grep). This is a structural analysis detection issue, not a rendering issue.
title: class: Parse failure on basic class diagram
